intended_use: Primary runtime for scRNA-seq QC/clustering (dicer1_scrna_qc/controls/tumors/controls_and_tumors), bulk RNA-seq (dicer1_rna), pathway analysis (dicer1_scrna_run_pathway_analysis), inferCNV pipeline
known_limitations: msigdbr 7.5.1 has breaking API changes vs paper code (fixed in patched scripts); Seurat v5 S7 object compatibility issues (fixed with tryCatch patches)

intended_use: Xenium spatial analysis (dicer1_xenium_proseg_mus_musculus, dicer1_xenium_proseg_homo_sapiens) requiring SeuratWrappers, as.cell_data_set, Banksy
known_limitations: Does not have all 653_renv packages; use 653_renv for QDNAseq/infercnv/decoupleR-related scripts
